name: Opus Bank
description: Opus Bank was a California-chartered commercial bank headquartered in Irvine, California, that provided a comprehensive suite of banking products and services to its clients. The institution operated numerous banking offices across California, Washington, Oregon, and Arizona, focusing on treasury, cash management, and depository solutions. In June 2020, Opus Bank was acquired by Pacific Premier Bancorp, Inc., and subsequently integrated into Pacific Premier Bank. Prior to its acquisition, the bank was publicly traded on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol OPB.
